sigWerErrors.reason: The insertion of '想' (want) adds an intention to the sentence, changing it from 'I increase my credit card limit' to 'I want to increase my credit card limit.' This does not derail the meaning of the sentence, as the main action remains the same, but it does add a nuance of intention.
